posts.text: I will enter once they start reducing their provisions, in Q3 again credit cost started to jump as compared with Q2. Q3 credit costs include the ECL on digital biz, but lets see how they will end Q4. Their NPA numbers are always misleading since listing, NPA numbers are always on lowerside and credit cost is used to be on higher side. image 1597×751 144 KB
